ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ciphers" (
  "cipher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cipher */,
  "cipher_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptographic cipher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cipher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cipher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cipher was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the cipher is currently in use */,
  "security_level" INTEGER /* Integer to indicate the security level of the cipher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cipher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_algorithms" (
  "ga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic algorithm run */,
  "cipher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cipher being optimized */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time constraint for the algorithm */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "fitness_function" INTEGER /* Function used to evaluate fitness */,
  "selection_method" INTEGER /* Method used for selecting individuals */,
  "mutation_strategy" INTEGER /* Strategy for mutating individuals */,
  "crossover_technique" INTEGER /* Technique used for crossover */,
  "max_fitness" REAL /* Maximum fitness achieved */,
  "mean_fitness_change" REAL /* Mean change in fitness over generations */,
  "num_generations" INTEGER /* Number of generations required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the genetic algorithm run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the genetic algorithm run was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enum to indicate the status of the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the genetic algorithm started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the genetic algorithm ended */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken in seconds */,
  "initial_population_fitness" REAL /* Initial population fitness */,
  "final_population_fitness" REAL /* Final population fitness */,
  "num_evaluations" INTEGER /* Number of fitness evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_algorithms_cipher_id FOREIGN KEY ("cipher_id") REFERENCES ciphers ("cipher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_algorithms_selection_method FOREIGN KEY ("selection_method") REFERENCES selection_methods ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_algorithms_crossover_technique FOREIGN KEY ("crossover_technique") REFERENCES crossover_techniques ("crossover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_algorithms_mutation_strategy FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_strategy") REFERENCES mutation_strategies ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_algorithms_fitness_function FOREIGN KEY ("fitness_function") REFERENCES fitness_functions ("fitness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_functions" (
  "fitness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness function */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fitness function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fitness function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fitness function was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fitness function was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fitness function is currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selection_methods" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the selection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the selection method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the selection method was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the selection method is currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_strategies" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mutation strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mutation strategy was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the mutation strategy is currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crossover_techniques" (
  "crossover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crossover technique */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crossover technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crossover technique */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the crossover technique was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the crossover technique was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the crossover technique is currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crossover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "ga_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic algorithm run */,
  "max_fitness" REAL /* Maximum fitness achieved */,
  "mean_fitness_change" REAL /* Mean change in fitness over generations */,
  "num_generations" INTEGER /* Number of generations required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "is_computed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric has been computed */,
  "computation_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to compute the metric in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_ga_id FOREIGN KEY ("ga_id") REFERENCES genetic_algorithms ("ga_id")
)
